summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mitti Basket V2 redesign. All features working correctly: hero carousel auto-scrolls between 4 slides (Mangoes, Litchi, Makhana, A2 Ghee), Flamingo Estate-style navbar with centered brand and left nav links, 'They're Back' season harvest section with variety tags and 4 product cards, Village Pantry section with hover showing quantity selector and subscribe options (4/6/8 weeks), all navigation links working, waitlist form POST /api/waitlist working, footer newsletter form working.
passed_tests: Duplicate email handling returns existing entry
Hero carousel auto-scrolls every 5 seconds (Mangoes -> Litchi -> Makhana -> A2 Ghee)
Navbar: left nav links (Season Harvest, Village Pantry, Festive Foods, Farm Baskets)
Navbar: right 'Order Now' CTA button with WhatsApp link
Trust strip shows 'Direct From Farmers' (not '24hr Farm to Door')
Season Harvest: 'They're Back' secondary hero banner
Season Harvest: variety tags (Langra, Himsagar, Chausa, Shahi Litchi)
Season Harvest: 4 product cards with prices
Harvest cards show 'Buy Now' on hover with WhatsApp link
Village Pantry: hero banner with product tags (A2 Ghee, Makhana, Sattu, Dals)
Pantry card hover: Ghee shows 1kg min, others show 5kg min
Pantry card hover: subscribe options (4/6/8 weeks dropdown)
Pantry card hover: one-time purchase option
Pantry card hover: Order Now button
'Shop Our Season Harvest' link redirects to /mango-harvest
'View All Pantry Essentials' link redirects to /village-pantry
Waitlist form on subscription page works
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - public marketing website
seed_data_creation: Test waitlist entries created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 redesign complete with Flamingo Estate-style UI. Hero carousel auto-scrolls between 4 product slides. Season Harvest section has 'They're Back' banner with variety tags. Village Pantry cards have hover functionality with quantity selector and subscribe options. All navigation and forms working correctly.
